What can I say about her that hasn't been said? On ALL OF OUR SOULS WE GOONED TO THE ZOOLOGIST ATLEAST ONE TIME IN OUR LIVES!!! YES! WE!

If this information is important to you, this takes place on pre-hardmode, and the corruption here is the crimson biome.

So yeah! Meet Lizzy! The new zoologist of your island! She wants to know EVERYTHING about the creatures living in this "world". Will you help her or will you just... i dunno, what else will you do???

Anyways, I can FINALLY update you guys on my Terraria world!

So, nothing much happened since the last entry, but here's a recap of what happened until now!

I got my ass beaten on my first few nights, I went mining and came out with much more better armor, grinded, made houses for NPCs, beat the hell out of the Eye of Cthulhu and expanded the village. I didn't have time to play another session because I was busy doing these bots and drawing, but I plan on going to fight that fuckass skeleton next time.

I cannot lie there were SO many scrumptious options for the profile picture. Can't believe there were so many talented people making such beautiful art of a character.

Anyways, as always...

HOPE YOU ENJOY!
